title: Property Consultant - DLF - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - DLF - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
